title: Postal addresses for sending paper documents :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Postal addresses for sending paper documents
Immigration New Zealand postal and courier addresses.

## New Zealand postal and courier addresses
If you apply for a visa using a paper application form, it may take us longer to process your application.
Immigration New Zealand PO Box 76895 Manukau 2241 Auckland
Immigration New Zealand DX Box: EP71514 20 Fairfax Avenue Penrose Auckland 1061
If you are in New Zealand and sending us your passport, we recommend using a signature-required courier service.

## Overseas postal addresses
Use the Fees, decisions and address search tool to:
- find postal addresses if you are not in New Zealand
- check the cost of an application.
Fees, decision times and where to apply
